title: Tevlaphee Steering Wheel Lock with Alarm, 120dB, Wheel Spoke Width ≤2.75in, Battery Required, Crook Locks for Cars, Car Lock Anti-Theft Device, Heavy Duty
features: 【NOTE】COMPATIBILITY REQUIRED: Fits ONLY steering wheels with spoke width ≤2.75in" (7cm). Measure before purchase! REQUIRES 3 AAA BATTERIES - Must Purchase Separately!

【MICRO MOTION ALARM DESIGN】After 8 seconds of locking, as long as the steering wheel lock body is slightly touched to trigger the alarm mechanism, a 120dB alarm sound will sound to warn the owner, deter thieves, and protect the safety of your car

【LED WARNING LIGHT】When the lock activates the protection mechanism, the warning light flashes once per second. Let thieves know in advance that this is not an ordinary car steering wheel lock and stay away from your car.

【Class B+ FULL COPPER LOCK CYLINDER】The two-way irregular lock core is specially designed to prevent professional thieves and mutual open rate. Upgraded all copper lock core improves anti-theft performance,giving you more peace of mind
【UPGRADED MATERIALS】Heat-treated steel bars increase the hardness of the steel, making the lock body extremely hard, durable, and significantly improved in sawing resistance and shear resistance
description: Product Description TEVLAPEHE STEERING WHEEL LOCK WITH ALARM Now that auto theft is increasing, it is very important to have a good quality and deterrent car steering wheel lock. Tevlaphee responds to the needs of customers with an alarm steering wheel lock that combines both alarm and vehicle theft in one. Previous page 120DB ALARM & MICRO MOTION ALARM DESIGN LED warning lights can scare off some potential thieves for you. Then just touch the steering wheel lock after 8 seconds of locking, and 120dB siren will sound, deterring thieves leave your car. THREE-POINT LOCK DESIGN The left, right and lower sides of the steering wheel must be sawed off at the same time to remove the steering wheel lock, which greatly increases the difficulty of car theft. Next page Class B+ FULL COPPER LOCK CYLINDER The two-way irregular lock core is specially designed to prevent professional thieves and mutual open rate. Upgraded all copper lock core improves anti-theft performance, giving you more peace of mind! HIGH QUALITY Heat-treated steel increase the hardness of the lock, making the lock body extremely hard, durable, and significantly improved in sawing resistance. ANTI-SCRATCH The part of the lock that contacts the steering wheel is covered with wear-resistant leather to prevent scratching the steering wheel. COMFORTABLE HANDLE The handle is wrapped in genuine leather, which is more comfortable to use. BATTERY REQUIRED This product requires 3 AAA(LR03/IEC R03) batteries. Please insert the batteries before use. (Batteries not included in the package) You don't need a key before locking, just push it to lock! In an emergency, it can be used as a safety hammer to smash the window glass and leave the dangerous environment. Previous page If the width of steering wheel at the three-pronged cross position is ≤7cm, it will fit your car. The lock head can be extended up to a MAX of 2.6". Even with a steering wheel cover, it still works! Turn the steering wheel to the position as shown in the picture,then lock! PS: 4 screws are provided as spare. The screws are used to fix the battery compartment cover.
